system.description:
◇ *magical*

This bedroll is decorated with Forest Folk beadwork and lined with the softest rabbit fur. It tethers a nurturing, protective spirit, one that is quiet and comforting.

When you **_Make Camp in the fur-lined_** **_bedroll_**, you regain 1d6 (extra) HP and gain advantage on your next roll.

*An artifact of the wider world — see @UUID[Compendium.stonetop.wider-world-and-other-wonders.JournalEntry.HOWpYxmR8Q44qS3E]{Spirits of the wild}.*
